creator: cetcheve@gmail.com
text:
Same problem here.
I have found a quite dirty temporary solution : removing the patch file
x11-servers/xorg-server/files/patch-Xserver-hw-xfree86-os-support-bsd-bsd_mouse.c.

The problem seems to be linked to the sysmouse handling stuff contained in
this patch.

I hope this will help people until maintainers correct the patch file.

-- 
Christophe E.
